description_long: This object is a chainsaw with a robust, angular orange body and a prominent metallic cutting bar extending from one end. The body features two large, dark handles: one wrap-around handle on the top and a secondary handle on the side, both designed for secure grip and control. The cutting bar is silver with a dark edge, suggesting a toothed chain for cutting wood or similar materials. The side of the body displays a circular cap, likely for fuel or oil, and a few raised details that may represent controls or vents. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws and molded features for durability and function. The chainsaw's color scheme is primarily orange and black, typical for power tools to enhance visibility and safety in urban or workshop environments.
description: A bright orange chainsaw with a metallic cutting bar, two large black handles, and functional details like a side cap and molded body features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed end of the orange body and the wrap-around black handle framing the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the metallic cutting bar, the angular orange body, and both black handles.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the orange body, the wrap-around handle, and the narrow profile of the cutting bar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the circular cap, additional body details, and the full length of the cutting bar.
attribute_handle_design: Two handles: a large wrap-around top handle and a side handle, both angular and designed for secure grip.
attribute_power_source_indicator: A circular cap on the side suggests a fuel or oil reservoir, likely indicating a gasoline power source.
